app.title: Arknights: Endfield Combo Builder
app.description: Visual combo builder for Arknights: Endfield team compositions

plungeAttack.description: Using a Normal Attack while airborne causes you to plunge down and deal Physical damage to surrounding enemies.

messages.comboSkillNotInWindow: Combo skill conditions are not met.

combo_skill.name: Wildfire
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy is in Combustion or Corrosion state. Deals Heat damage.

ultimate.name: Ragnarok
ultimate.description: Summons Fire Sword. Switches to controlled operator. Enhanced normal attacks with Heat damage and infliction.

combo_skill.name: Matrix Transfer
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy enters Arts Reaction state. Deals Nature damage and forces Lift effect.

ultimate.name: Gravity Field
ultimate.description: Creates gravitational anomaly field. Deals Nature damage with Nature Infliction. Enemies become Slowed and Arts Vulnerable.

combo_skill.name: Ice-chan u37
combo_skill.description: Activate after heavy attack on Frozen enemy. Deploys Ice-chan that damages and eventually Freezes enemies.

ultimate.name: Ice Shooter
ultimate.description: Deploys Pita-chan. Switches to controlled operator. Enhanced normal attacks with increased critical rate and Cryo damage.

combo_skill.name: Sealing Array
combo_skill.description: Activate when other operators' synergy skills deal damage. Deals Physical damage and applies Originium Crystals.

ultimate.name: Assault Array
ultimate.description: Launches Arts attack dealing high Physical damage. Consumes Originium Crystals for additional damage.

combo_skill.name: Eruption Column
combo_skill.description: Activate when heavy attack hits non-Crash/Arts Infliction enemy. Deals Nature damage and forces Corrosion.

ultimate.name: Fluffy Party
ultimate.description: Continuously releases Arts. Summons Dorry clones dealing Nature damage to surrounding enemies.

combo_skill.name: Full Moon Counter
combo_skill.description: Activate when Crash stacks are consumed by Smash or Shatter. Performs up to 3 slashes based on consumed stacks.

ultimate.name: Shield Legion, Advance
ultimate.description: Summons 4 shield soldiers. They march forward dealing Physical damage and gaining Iron Oath stacks.

combo_skill.name: Winter Hunger
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy has 3+ Cryo stacks. Consumes all Cryo stacks to deal damage and recover charge.

ultimate.name: Final Farewell
ultimate.description: Dons frost armor and generates ice scythe. Performs 3 slashes dealing high Cryo damage. Becomes invulnerable.

combo_skill.name: Frontline Support
combo_skill.description: Activate when controlled operator takes damage. Leaps to enemy dealing Physical damage and Knockdown.

ultimate.name: Flame of Oath
ultimate.description: Strikes ground dealing Heat damage. Grants all team members Shield based on Ember's max HP.

combo_skill.name: Wrath Form
combo_skill.description: Activate after heavy attack on Vulnerable or Shattered enemy. Deals Physical damage and gains Link status.

ultimate.name: Immovable Heart
ultimate.description: Releases avatar to strike ground. Deals Physical damage with Knockdown and pulls enemies to center.

combo_skill.name: Heavenly River Ascent
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy enters Crash state. Performs continuous slashes dealing Physical damage and Lift.

ultimate.name: Frozen Wind Slash
ultimate.description: Performs 7 slashes dealing Physical damage each time. Final slash deals higher damage.

combo_skill.name: Frag Grenade β
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy gains Arts Infliction. Throws grenade dealing Heat damage and Heat Infliction.

ultimate.name: Wolf's Rage
ultimate.description: Rapidly fires Wolf's Rage at surrounding enemies. Deals Heat damage 5 times and forces Combustion.

combo_skill.name: Thunder Spear: Flash Strike
combo_skill.description: Activate after heavy attack on Electric Infliction or Shocked enemy. Throws 3 spears dealing Electric damage.

ultimate.name: Thunder Spear: Decisive Quake
ultimate.description: Throws enhanced spear to target area dealing high Electric damage to surrounding enemies.

combo_skill.name: Stress Test
combo_skill.description: Activate when Support Crystal healing uses are depleted. Throws crystal dealing Cryo damage and Cryo Infliction.

ultimate.name: Stack Overflow
ultimate.description: Grants all team members Cryo Amplification and Nature Amplification. Effect increases with Intelligence.

combo_skill.name: Ice Fishing Tactics
combo_skill.description: Activate when nearby enemy's Arts Reaction or Originium Crystals are consumed. Deals Physical damage.

ultimate.name: Big Catch!
ultimate.description: Catches and throws massive scale beast at enemies. Deals wide-range Cryo damage with Cryo Infliction.

combo_skill.name: Thunder Roar
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy is Shocked or Shock is consumed. Performs continuous slashes dealing Physical damage.

ultimate.name: Thunderbolt Split
ultimate.description: Charges with electricity to rush forward. Deals Electric damage with Electric Infliction and forces Shock.

combo_skill.name: Arctic Rescue
combo_skill.description: Activate when controlled operator is attacked below 60% HP. Throws rescue kit that heals nearby operators.

ultimate.name: Freezing Frost
ultimate.description: Jumps and slams shield dealing high Cryo damage. Creates persistent ice field that Freezes enemies.

combo_skill.name: Instant Protocol: Flash Chain
combo_skill.description: Activate when controlled operator deals heavy attack. Releases energy dealing Electric damage and forcing Shock.

ultimate.name: Protocol ε: 70.41k
ultimate.description: Transfers massive orbital object to target area. Deals devastating Electric damage to enemies in range.

combo_skill.name: Distortion
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy enters Freeze state. Deals Physical damage and forces Lift effect.

ultimate.name: Tremolo
ultimate.description: Strikes ground with spear shaft. Deals Physical damage and forces Lift on Vulnerable enemies.

combo_skill.name: Magnetic Storm Lab
combo_skill.description: Activate when focused enemy gains Physical Reaction or Arts Infliction. Causes energy explosion dealing Electric damage.

ultimate.name: Limiter Release
ultimate.description: Grants all team members Electric Amplification and Heat Amplification.

combo_skill.name: Seasoning!
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy Crash reaches 4 stacks. Swings wok dealing high Physical damage with enhanced Smash.

ultimate.name: Add Ingredients!
ultimate.description: Slams cutting board forcing Lift. Performs 6 consecutive attacks and slams enemies down with Knockdown.

combo_skill.name: Immediate Suppression
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy charges or operator HP drops below 40%. Deals Physical damage and grants Shield.

ultimate.name: Textbook Perfect
ultimate.description: Swings greatsword for 2 quick slashes applying Weaken. Then slams ground dealing high damage with Knockdown.

combo_skill.name: Special Service
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy has 2+ Cryo or Nature stacks. Causes explosion dealing Nature damage.

ultimate.name: Boring Drama
ultimate.description: Moves in arc while rapidly shooting inside. Deals Nature damage 4 times. Enhanced bomb explosion if present.

combo_skill.name: Assault Flash
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy reaches Break state or point. Performs charging attacks dealing Physical damage.

ultimate.name: Everyone, Assemble!
ultimate.description: Continuously releases Arts firing 3 rally flares. Each flare recovers SP.

combo_skill.name: River, Obey Me!
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy has Cryo Infliction or Arts Burst. Unleashes torrents dealing Cryo damage and applying Cryo Infliction.

ultimate.name: The Big Boss is Watching!
ultimate.description: Unleashes a massive wave dealing Cryo damage to enemies in range.

base_attack.name: Boiling Wolf Blood
base_attack.description: Normal Attack: Up to 5-hit combo dealing Physical damage. Heavy Attack deals additional Break Value 18.

battle_skill.name: Crimson Shadow
battle_skill.description: Dashes forward dealing Physical damage and inflicting Lift. Against enemies in Crash state, follows up with an additional dash dealing Heat damage.

combo_skill.name: Fleeting Shadow
combo_skill.description: Activate when enemy is in Crash state AND has any Arts Infliction. 1st hit: Physical damage. 2nd hit: Consumes all Arts Infliction dealing Physical damage and Lift. Perfect Combo: grants 1 additional Crash stack.

ultimate.name: "Razor Claw" Ambush
ultimate.description: Deals multiple hits of Heat damage and applies Heat Infliction.
